title: dianthus gaditanus subsp. hispanicus
intro: Dianthus gaditanus subsp. hispanicus, also known as Spanish pink or Iberian pink, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is a perennial herb with fragrant flowers that have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dianthus gaditanus subsp. hispanicus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
